title: stacker
description:
The Stack Item and Stack Mob system provides an optimized approach to entity
management by consolidating large quantities of items and mobs into unified
stacks. This significantly decreases entity counts within the server environment,
resulting in improved
body:
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/stackitem) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/stacker-plugin) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/9MhgYVsNFr)


Auto Item Merge is a project that automatically combines identical items when they are on the ground. Players can throw an item to merge it with dropped items, making item management easier and more organized.

Features

- Automatically combines identical items on the ground
- Players can throw an item to merge it with dropped ones
- Helps reduce clutter from scattered items
